problem: Can superconductivity be achieved at room temperature — what material structure?
hypothesis: Spintronics for low-power data storage may resolve Can superconductivity be achieved at room temperature — what material structure? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Spectroscopic analysis with 9 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
